stories.title: Mbappé, France dispatch Morocco with latest lethal...
stories.summary: France are favorites to win the World Cup for many reasons -- the first being Kylian Mbappé, perhaps the best player in the world right now.

stories.title: Mbappé guides France past Morocco to WC semis
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé recovered from a missed penalty to score his 20th World Cup goal and help send France through to the semifinals with a 2-0 win over Morocco.

stories.title: Clips-Raptors trade for Kawhi on hold amid probe
stories.summary: The Clippers-Raptors trade involving Kawhi Leonard will not be completed until the NBA probe into whether the Clippers circumvented the salary cap is completed.

stories.title: Steph acknowledges 'allure' of playing with LeBron...
stories.summary: Stephen Curry acknowledged the appeal of a late-career Hall of Fame team-up with his longtime NBA rival LeBron James.

stories.title: Sources: Teams courting LeBron via voice memos
stories.summary: As LeBron James' free agency decision stretches into its second week, some teams interested in him joining them have had an opportunity to pitch the four-time champion indirectly.
